---
title: "Hypothesis Testing"
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

[← All courses](../teaching.qmd){.back-link}

::: {.page-intro}
An introduction to statistical hypothesis testing for **1A ENSAI** students: testing models,
classical tests on Gaussian populations, goodness-of-fit and homogeneity, tests for dependency,
and multiple testing. See the [Glossary](../glossary.qmd) for English/French translations and
the note on [Density and Likelihood](../probability/density_likelihood.qmd) for background.
:::

## Chapters

::: {.aurora-card-grid}
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🧪</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Testing Models</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">Statistical models, hypotheses, level and power.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/testing_models_fr.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides Fr</a>
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/testing_models.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> En</a>
    <a class="res-btn" href="lectures/testing_models.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">📄</span> Notes</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">📈</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Usual Distributions</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">The χ², Student and Fisher laws behind the tests.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/usual_distributions_fr.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides Fr</a>
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/usual_distributions.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> En</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🔔</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Classical Tests on Gaussian Populations</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">Tests on the mean and variance; two-sample comparisons.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/gaussian_populations_fr.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides Fr</a>
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/gaussian_populations.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> En</a>
    <a class="res-btn" href="lectures/gaussian_populations.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">📄</span> Notes</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🎲</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Goodness of Fit and Homogeneity</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">χ² goodness-of-fit and homogeneity tests.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/goodness_of_fit_chi2_fr.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides Fr</a>
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/goodness_of_fit_chi2.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> En</a>
    <a class="res-btn" href="lectures/goodness_of_fit_chi2.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">📄</span> Notes</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🔗</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Tests for Dependency</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">Independence and correlation tests in contingency tables.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/dependency_fr.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides Fr</a>
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/dependency.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> En</a>
    <a class="res-btn" href="lectures/dependency.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">📄</span> Notes</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🧮</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Multiple Testing and Detection Rates</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">Multiple testing, FWER / FDR, and minimax detection.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/multiple_minimax_fr.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides Fr</a>
  </span>
</div>
:::

## Materials

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Exercises (Fr)

::: {.resource-grid}
[TD1](TDs/TD1_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD2](TDs/TD2_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD3](TDs/TD3_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD4](TDs/TD4_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD5 — exercices supplémentaires (en cours, hors TD)](TDs/TD5_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TP](TDs/TP_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
:::

## Exercises (En)

::: {.resource-grid}
[TD1](TDs/TD1.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD2](TDs/TD2.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD3](TDs/TD3.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD4](TDs/TD4.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TP](TDs/TP.qmd){.resource-chip}
:::

## Annals

::: {.resource-grid}
[Exam 2025](annals/test_2025.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Correction 2025](annals/correction_2025.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Exam 2026 (PDF)](annals/test_2026.pdf){.resource-chip}
[Correction 2026 (PDF)](annals/correction_2026.pdf){.resource-chip}
:::

## Pluto Notebooks

::: {.resource-grid}
[Proba Basics](pluto/proba_basics.html){.resource-chip}
[Approximation of Distributions](pluto/distribution_comparisons.html){.resource-chip}
[Illustration of p-value](pluto/illustration_pvalue.html){.resource-chip}
:::

:::
